wins: Fourth consecutive quarter of improved execution
Revenue, gross margin, and EPS above guidance
Significant improvement in cash position and liquidity
Accelerated funding from U.S. government, NVIDIA, and SoftBank
Strong demand for Granite Rapids in hyperscalers
risks: Supply constraints on Intel 10 and Intel 7
Tight capacity environment expected to persist into 2026
Lower gross margin in Q4 due to product mix and deconsolidation of Altera
Challenges in transitioning customers off older products
Uncertainty around 18A yields and capacity ramp
